# ostler_security dependencies – pinned versions for supply chain safety (AV-7)
# Update these versions deliberately, not automatically.
# TODO: add --require-hashes once hash values are captured for all platforms

cryptography>=46.0.1,<47.0.0
sqlcipher3>=0.6.0,<0.7.0

# OPF (OpenAI Privacy Filter) runtime. Optional install group in
# pyproject.toml ([opf]); listed here so a plain `pip install -r
# requirements.txt` development-time install picks them up. Switched
# from transformers + torch (~4 GB) to onnxruntime + tokenizers
# (~50 MB) on 2026-05-01 – see THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md.
onnxruntime>=1.18.0,<2.0.0
tokenizers>=0.20.0,<1.0.0
huggingface_hub>=0.25.0,<1.0.0
numpy>=1.24.0,<3.0.0
